name: B.E. Rojgaar
overview: An aspirational tale of three engineer friends, Akshay, Piyu and Papdya, who go on a journey from being 'be rojgaar' to creating 'rojgaar' by stumbling on a start-up idea and going back to their roots.

trailers.title: B.E. Rojgaar - Official Trailer | SCALER #CreateImpact | From 20th May | #Bhadipa #MarathiWebseries
